sEn: Step-Audio 2 achieves state-of-the-art performance in audio understanding and speech conversation through latent audio encoding, reasoning-centric RL, and retrieval-augmented generation.
sZh: Step-Audio 2 通过潜在音频编码、以推理为中心的强化学习和检索增强生成，在音频理解和语音对话中实现了最先进的性能。
absEn: This paper presents Step-Audio 2, an end-to-end multi-modal large language model designed for industry-strength audio understanding and speech conversation. By integrating a latent audio encoder and reasoning-centric reinforcement learning (RL), Step-Audio 2 achieves promising performance in automatic speech recognition (ASR) and audio understanding. To facilitate genuine end-to-end speech conversation, Step-Audio 2 incorporates the generation of discrete audio tokens into language modeling, significantly enhancing its responsiveness to paralinguistic information such as speaking styles and emotions. To effectively leverage the rich textual and acoustic knowledge in real-world data, Step-Audio 2 integrates retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and is able to call external tools such as web search to mitigate hallucination and audio search to switch timbres. Trained on millions of hours of speech and audio data, Step-Audio 2 delivers intelligence and expressiveness across diverse conversational scenarios. Evaluation results demonstrate that Step-Audio 2 achieves state-of-the-art performance on various audio understanding and conversational benchmarks compared to other open-source and commercial solutions. Please visit https://github.com/stepfun-ai/Step-Audio2 for more information.
absZh: 本文介绍了 Step-Audio 2，一个为工业级音频理解和语音对话设计的端到端多模态大语言模型。通过集成潜在音频编码器和以推理为中心的强化学习（RL），Step-Audio 2 在自动语音识别（ASR）和音频理解方面取得了令人瞩目的性能。为了实现真正的端到端语音对话，Step-Audio 2 将离散音频令牌的生成融入语言建模，显著增强了对副语言信息（如说话风格和情感）的响应能力。为了有效利用现实世界数据中的丰富文本和声学知识，Step-Audio 2 集成了检索增强生成（RAG），并能够调用外部工具（如网络搜索）以减少幻觉，以及音频搜索以切换音色。经过数百万小时的语音和音频数据训练，Step-Audio 2 在各种对话场景中展现出智能和表现力。评估结果表明，与其他开源和商业解决方案相比，Step-Audio 2 在多种音频理解和对话基准测试中达到了最先进的性能。更多信息请访问 https://github.com/stepfun-ai/Step-Audio2。

contrib.en: Integrates latent audio encoder and reasoning-centric RL for enhanced audio understanding.
contrib.zh: 集成潜在音频编码器和以推理为中心的强化学习，增强音频理解能力。

contrib.en: Incorporates discrete audio token generation into language modeling for end-to-end speech interaction.
contrib.zh: 将离散音频令牌生成融入语言建模，实现端到端语音交互。

contrib.en: Integrates retrieval-augmented generation and external tools like web and audio search.
contrib.zh: 集成检索增强生成和外部工具，如网络搜索和音频搜索。

contrib.en: Trained on 8 million hours of speech and audio data with multi-stage training strategy.
contrib.zh: 采用多阶段训练策略，在800万小时语音和音频数据上训练。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on ASR, audio understanding, and speech conversation benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 在ASR、音频理解和语音对话基准上达到最先进性能。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to Chinese and English, with partial multilingual results.
limits.zh: 评估限于中文和英文，多语言结果部分覆盖。

limits.en: Relies on synthetic data for paralinguistic and tool-call training.
limits.zh: 依赖合成数据进行副语言和工具调用训练。

limits.en: Tool-call evaluation uses only Chinese speech conversations.
limits.zh: 工具调用评估仅使用中文语音对话。

limits.en: Audio search tool requires a pre-built voice library.
limits.zh: 音频搜索工具需要预构建的语音库。

limits.en: Performance on English speech conversation slightly below GPT-4o Audio.
limits.zh: 英文语音对话性能略低于GPT-4o Audio。

items.en: This paper presents Step-Audio 2, an end-to-end multi-modal large language model designed for industry-strength audio understanding and speech conversation. By integrating a latent audio encoder and reasoning-centric reinforcement learning (RL), Step-Audio 2 achieves promising performance in automatic speech recognition (ASR) and audio understanding. To facilitate genuine end-to-end speech conversation, Step-Audio 2 incorporates the generation of discrete audio tokens into language modeling, significantly enhancing its responsiveness to paralinguistic information such as speaking styles and emotions. To effectively leverage the rich textual and acoustic knowledge in real-world data, Step-Audio 2 integrates retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and is able to call external tools such as web search to mitigate hallucination and audio search to switch timbres. Trained on millions of hours of speech and audio data, Step-Audio 2 delivers intelligence and expressiveness across diverse conversational scenarios. Evaluation results demonstrate that Step-Audio 2 achieves state-of-the-art performance on various audio understanding and conversational benchmarks compared to other open-source and commercial solutions. Please visit https://github.com/stepfun-ai/Step-Audio2 for more information.
items.zh: 本文提出 Step-Audio 2，一种端到端的多模态大语言模型，专为工业级音频理解和语音对话设计。通过集成潜在音频编码器和以推理为中心的强化学习（RL），Step-Audio 2 在自动语音识别（ASR）和音频理解方面取得了有前景的性能。为了促进真正的端到端语音对话，Step-Audio 2 将离散音频令牌的生成融入语言建模，显著增强了对副语言信息（如说话风格和情感）的响应能力。为了有效利用真实世界数据中丰富的文本和声学知识，Step-Audio 2 集成了检索增强生成（RAG），并能够调用外部工具（如网络搜索）以减少幻觉，以及音频搜索以切换音色。Step-Audio 2 在数百万小时的语音和音频数据上训练，在各种对话场景中提供了智能和表现力。评估结果表明，与其他开源和商业解决方案相比，Step-Audio 2 在各种音频理解和对话基准测试中达到了最先进的性能。更多信息请访问 https://github.com/stepfun-ai/Step-Audio2。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Performance comparision of GPT-4o Audio1, Kimi-Audio2, Qwen-Omni3 and Step-Audio 2 and on various benchmarks.
items.capZh: 图 1：GPT-4o Audio、Kimi-Audio、Qwen-Omni 和 Step-Audio 2 在各种基准测试上的性能比较。

items.en: With the rapid development of large language models and audio processing technology, large audio language models (LALMs) have demonstrated their superiority over conventional approaches in various speech and audio processing tasks. GPT-4o is first introduced and is pioneering the development of end-to-end speech interaction without intermediate textual conversions. Subsequently, many open-sourced LALMs [9, 13, 16, 18, 21, 31, 32, 49, 71, 72, 74, 77] are emerged, advancing multi-modal large language model capabilities in various speech and audio domains. Among these approaches, Qwen-Audio [12] and Qwen2-Audio [13] perform audio analysis and generate textual responses to speech instructions. Qwen2.5-Omni [74] implements a thinker-talker architecture to enable full-duplex I/O during speech conversations. More recently, Kimi-Audio [18] has achieved impressive results on multiple speech and audio understanding benchmarks. In parallel, we have introduced Step-Audio [32] and Step-Audio-AQAA [31], the first LALMs to unify speech understanding and generation through discrete audio tokens at a scale of 130 billion parameters.
items.zh: 随着大语言模型和音频处理技术的快速发展，大型音频语言模型（LALM）在各种语音和音频处理任务中展现了优于传统方法的性能。GPT-4o 首次被引入，开创了无需中间文本转换的端到端语音交互。随后，许多开源的 LALM [9, 13, 16, 18, 21, 31, 32, 49, 71, 72, 74, 77] 涌现出来，推动了多模态大语言模型在多种语音和音频领域的能力。在这些方法中，Qwen-Audio [12] 和 Qwen2-Audio [13] 执行音频分析并生成对语音指令的文本响应。Qwen2.5-Omni [74] 实现了思考者-说话者架构，以在语音对话中实现全双工输入/输出。最近，Kimi-Audio [18] 在多个语音和音频理解基准测试中取得了令人印象深刻的结果。与此同时，我们推出了 Step-Audio [32] 和 Step-Audio-AQAA [31]，这是首批通过离散音频令牌统一语音理解和生成的 LALM，规模达 1300 亿参数。

items.en: However, existing LALMs still face challenges in achieving natural and intelligent speech interaction. Previous LALMs such as Spirit LM [49] and GLM-4-Voice [77] mainly focus on aligning the semantic information in speech inputs to text modal, neglecting the para-linguistic information which is also crucial for intentional understanding. Although LALMs including Qwen-Audio [12], Qwen2-Audio [13] and Audio Flamingo series [24, 25, 43] are capable of comprehending such information, they typically generate only textual outputs and fail to further utilize this capability to produce coherent and expressive responses in speech conversations. Moreover, due to the complexities of multi-modal modeling, existing LALMs frequently suffer from hallucination and offer limited choices of timbres and speaking styles [16, 18], lacking access to real-world textual and acoustic knowledge.
items.zh: 然而，现有的 LALM 在实现自然和智能的语音交互方面仍面临挑战。之前的 LALM，如 Spirit LM [49] 和 GLM-4-Voice [77]，主要关注将语音输入中的语义信息与文本模态对齐，忽略了对于意图理解同样关键的副语言信息。尽管包括 Qwen-Audio [12]、Qwen2-Audio [13] 和 Audio Flamingo 系列 [24, 25, 43] 在内的 LALM 能够理解此类信息，但它们通常只生成文本输出，未能进一步利用这种能力在语音对话中产生连贯且富有表现力的响应。此外，由于多模态建模的复杂性，现有的 LALM 经常出现幻觉，并且提供的音色和说话风格选择有限 [16, 18]，缺乏对真实世界文本和声学知识的访问。

items.en: To address these issues and step into the next generation of multi-modal large language models, we present Step-Audio 2, an end-to-end large audio language model with industry-strength audio perception and speech interaction. Step-Audio 2 directly processes raw audio as input and outputs discrete text and audio tokens and has fewer parameters than Step-Audio [32]. Beyond capturing semantic information in speech, the model also comprehends para-linguistic and non-vocal information in audio. By leveraging chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning and reinforcement learning (RL), Step-Audio 2 further utilizes such multi-modal information to generate expressive speech responses coherent to different conversation scenarios. To ground the model with real-world knowledge, Step-Audio 2 incorporates retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and the capability to utilize various external tools, including web search and audio search, to provide more reliable and expressive responses. Specifically, we present an audio search as a tool unique to LALMs, enabling seamless speech retrieval via voice instructions and allowing the model to switch timbres and speaking styles based on the retrieved speech.
items.zh: 为了解决这些问题并进入下一代多模态大语言模型，我们提出了 Step-Audio 2，一种端到端的大型音频语言模型，具有工业级音频感知和语音交互能力。Step-Audio 2 直接处理原始音频作为输入，并输出离散的文本和音频令牌，且参数比 Step-Audio [32] 更少。除了捕捉语音中的语义信息，该模型还能理解音频中的副语言和非语音信息。通过利用思维链（CoT）推理和强化学习（RL），Step-Audio 2 进一步利用这种多模态信息生成与不同对话场景相一致的富有表现力的语音响应。为了使模型具备真实世界知识，Step-Audio 2 集成了检索增强生成（RAG）以及使用各种外部工具的能力，包括网络搜索和音频搜索，以提供更可靠和富有表现力的响应。具体来说，我们提出了一种音频搜索作为 LALM 独有的工具，能够通过语音指令实现无缝语音检索，并允许模型根据检索到的语音切换音色和说话风格。

items.en: To ensure its intelligence and expressiveness in diverse conversational scenarios, we carefully design a multi-stage training strategy to train Step-Audio 2 on 680 billion tokens of text data and 8 million hours of real and synthesized audio data. Evaluation results shown in Figure 1 demonstrate that Step-Audio 2 achieves state-of-the-art performance in a series of audio tasks, including automatic speech recognition (ASR) on multiple languages, audio understanding, speech-to-speech translation and speech-to-speech conversation. Typical usages of Step-Audio 2 are also illustrated in Figure 2.
items.zh: 为了确保其在多样化对话场景中的智能性和表现力，我们精心设计了一个多阶段训练策略，在 6800 亿令牌的文本数据和 800 万小时的真实及合成音频数据上训练 Step-Audio 2。图 1 所示的评估结果表明，Step-Audio 2 在一系列音频任务中达到了最先进的性能，包括多语言自动语音识别（ASR）、音频理解、语音到语音翻译和语音到语音对话。Step-Audio 2 的典型用法也在图 2 中进行了说明。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Illustration of the applications of Step-Audio 2 across various speech conversation scenarios.
items.capZh: 图 2：Step-Audio 2 在各种语音对话场景中的应用示意图。

items.en: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) [4, 29, 50, 51] have extended their application to a wide range of speech and audio understanding tasks, such as audio captioning, sound event detection, automatic speech recognition, audio classification, and audio-driven creative generation. A prevalent approach [13, 17, 27, 28, 48, 61] involves pairing speech encoders with lightweight, trainable adapters that project audio features into a textual embedding space compatible with LLMs. Building on this foundation, recent studies have further explored how to incorporate paralinguistic information such as emotion, intonation and speaker style, enabling LLMs to move beyond pure linguistic comprehension. For instance, ParalinGPT [48] focuses on enhancing a powerful text-based language model by integrating continuous speech embeddings, enabling it to capture paralinguistic signals such as emotion and prosody. SALMONN [61] adopts a multi-modal strategy by freezing speech encoders Whisper [53] and BEATs [10], and connecting their outputs to an LLM via a window-level Q-Former, enabling joint modeling of linguistic and acoustic features. Seed-ASR [5] integrates LUISE-based speech representations with instructions and context, using context-aware SFT to capture semantic information. AudioPaLM [57] combines PaLM-2 [2] and AudioLM [7], unifying linguistic knowledge with paralinguistic features like speaker identity and intonation. LLM-based approaches [12, 13] increasingly rely on pretrained audio encoders such as Wav2Vec [3], HuBERT [30], Whisper [53], and WavLM [11] to extract rich semantic representations from speech. At the same time, the extensive text knowledge and contextual reasoning capabilities stored in LLMs can provide valuable semantic guidance for understanding tasks.
items.zh: 大语言模型（LLM）[4, 29, 50, 51] 的最新进展已将其应用扩展到广泛的语音和音频理解任务，例如音频字幕、声音事件检测、自动语音识别、音频分类和音频驱动的创意生成。一种流行的方法 [13, 17, 27, 28, 48, 61] 涉及将语音编码器与轻量级、可训练的适配器配对，这些适配器将音频特征投影到与 LLM 兼容的文本嵌入空间中。在此基础上，最近的研究进一步探索了如何整合副语言信息，如情感、语调和说话者风格，使 LLM 超越纯粹的语言理解。例如，ParalinGPT [48] 专注于通过集成连续语音嵌入来增强强大的基于文本的语言模型，使其能够捕捉情感和韵律等副语言信号。SALMONN [61] 采用多模态策略，冻结语音编码器 Whisper [53] 和 BEATs [10]，并通过窗口级 Q-Former 将其输出连接到 LLM，从而实现语言和声学特征的联合建模。Seed-ASR [5] 将基于 LUISE 的语音表示与指令和上下文相结合，使用上下文感知的 SFT 来捕捉语义信息。AudioPaLM [57] 结合了 PaLM-2 [2] 和 AudioLM [7]，将语言知识与说话者身份和语调等副语言特征统一起来。基于 LLM 的方法 [12, 13] 越来越依赖预训练的音频编码器，如 Wav2Vec [3]、HuBERT [30]、Whisper [53] 和 WavLM [11]，从语音中提取丰富的语义表示。同时，LLM 中存储的广泛文本知识和上下文推理能力可以为理解任务提供有价值的语义指导。

items.en: Text-to-Speech (TTS) technology has made remarkable strides in recent years, evolving from traditional concatenative and statistical parametric approaches [52, 55, 59, 68] to codec-based TTS systems. Codec language models leverage a speech codec to extract discrete representations of speech [15, 16, 36, 60, 73, 76, 81, 82] and utilize either autoregressive [18, 80] or masked language models [67] to predict the corresponding speech tokens. These tokens are then synthesized into waveforms using codec vocoders. VALL-E [64] marked a significant breakthrough in this area. It uses an autoregressive model to generate coarse codec codes, followed by a non-autoregressive model for the fine codes. Unlike VALL-E, which predicts acoustic tokens from phonemes and requires transcripts, SPEAR-TTS [40] uses a two-stage architecture with self-supervised audio prompts to clone unseen voices from just 3 seconds of speech. SparkTTS [65] introduces BiCodec, a single-stream speech codec that encodes linguistic content as compact semantic tokens and speaker characteristics as fixed-length global tokens. Instead of relying on non-autoregressive models to predict residual discrete codes, methods like TorToiseTTS [6], CosyVoice [20], CosyVoice 2 [19], MiniMax-Speech [79] and SEED-TTS [1] adopt diffusion or flow-matching techniques as a second stage to reconstruct mel-spectrograms or continuous representations enriched with fine-grained acoustic and semantic details. Recent work, Kimi-Audio [18] combines Whisper features and semantic tokens for efficient modeling, with dual heads and a flow-matching detokenizer plus BigVGAN [46] for low-latency, expressive synthesis.
items.zh: 文本到语音（TTS）技术近年来取得了显著进展，从传统的拼接和统计参数方法 [52, 55, 59, 68] 演变为基于编解码器的 TTS 系统。编解码器语言模型利用语音编解码器提取语音的离散表示 [15, 16, 36, 60, 73, 76, 81, 82]，并使用自回归 [18, 80] 或掩码语言模型 [67] 预测相应的语音令牌。然后使用编解码器声码器将这些令牌合成为波形。VALL-E [64] 标志着该领域的重大突破。它使用自回归模型生成粗编解码器码，然后使用非自回归模型生成细码。与 VALL-E 从音素预测声学令牌并需要转录不同，SPEAR-TTS [40] 使用两阶段架构，通过自监督音频提示从仅 3 秒的语音中克隆未见过的声音。SparkTTS [65] 引入了 BiCodec，一种单流语音编解码器，将语言内容编码为紧凑的语义令牌，将说话者特征编码为固定长度的全局令牌。TorToiseTTS [6]、CosyVoice [20]、CosyVoice 2 [19]、MiniMax-Speech [79] 和 SEED-TTS [1] 等方法不依赖非自回归模型预测残差离散码，而是采用扩散或流匹配技术作为第二阶段，重建富含细粒度声学和语义细节的梅尔频谱图或连续表示。最近的工作 Kimi-Audio [18] 结合了 Whisper 特征和语义令牌进行高效建模，具有双头和流匹配解令牌器加上 BigVGAN [46] 用于低延迟、富有表现力的合成。

items.en: Speech-to-speech translation (S2ST) is a crucial technology for eliminating communication barriers across languages. Traditional S2ST systems [62, 70] typically adopt a cascaded pipeline consisting of automatic speech recognition (ASR), machine translation (MT), and TTS modules. Earlier studies [38, 39, 44, 45] have shifted toward direct approaches that bypass intermediate textual representations, aiming for lower latency and better preservation of prosody and speaker characteristics. Two main types of direct S2ST methods have emerged, which are known as speech-to-spectrogram translation and speech-to-unit translation. Both directly generate target speech representations from the source speech without relying on textual transcriptions. A representative of the former is Translatotron [38], the first end-to-end model to translate source speech directly into target spectrograms. Translatotron 2 [39], further improves translation quality through a two-pass decoding mechanism [45]. In contrast, speech-to-unit models predict discrete acoustic tokens rather than spectrograms, which are typically extracted using self-supervised speech encoders such as HuBERT [30] or WavLM [11]. For instance, TransVIP [44] employs a joint encoder-decoder architecture that first generates target text and residual vector quantization (RVQ) codes in the initial layer, followed by a non-causal language model that refines RVQ predictions in subsequent layers.
items.zh: 语音到语音翻译（S2ST）是消除跨语言沟通障碍的关键技术。传统的 S2ST 系统 [62, 70] 通常采用级联流水线，包括自动语音识别（ASR）、机器翻译（MT）和 TTS 模块。早期研究 [38, 39, 44, 45] 已转向绕过中间文本表示的直接方法，旨在降低延迟并更好地保留韵律和说话者特征。出现了两种主要类型的直接 S2ST 方法，即语音到频谱图翻译和语音到单元翻译。两者都直接从源语音生成目标语音表示，而不依赖文本转录。前者的代表是 Translatotron [38]，第一个将源语音直接翻译为目标频谱图的端到端模型。Translatotron 2 [39] 通过两遍解码机制 [45] 进一步提高了翻译质量。相比之下，语音到单元模型预测离散的声学令牌而不是频谱图，这些令牌通常使用自监督语音编码器（如 HuBERT [30] 或 WavLM [11]）提取。例如，TransVIP [44] 采用联合编码器-解码器架构，首先生成目标文本和第一层的残差向量量化（RVQ）码，然后由非因果语言模型在后续层中细化 RVQ 预测。

full.secZh: 2.4 语音到文本与语音到语音对话

items.en: Based on whether the LLM can directly understand and generate speech representations, existing systems can be categorized into end-to-end large audio language models and cascaded large audio language models. The former directly models audio inputs and outputs within a unified framework, while the latter relies on a modular pipeline involving separate ASR, LLM, and TTS components. Traditional speech-to-text and speech-to-speech systems typically adopt a cascaded architecture, as exemplified by AudioGPT [33] and Spoken-LLM [47]. However, the ASR + LLM + TTS pipeline incurs high latency and modular mismatches. This has spurred interest in unified end-to-end architectures for faster and more seamless integration. A major milestone in this direction is GPT-4o [34], which supports direct end-to-end speech interaction without requiring intermediate textual conversions. Recently, several new end-to-end LALMs [16, 21, 71, 72, 74] for speech-to-speech conversation have emerged. For instance, Moshi [16] improves efficiency with an RQ-Transformer that generates text and audio tokens simultaneously. Similarly, Mini-Omni [71] generates speech and text responses in parallel, following a strategy similar to MusicGen [14], which enables lower first-token latency compared to interleaved generation designs. LUCY [22] builds on the Mini-Omni architecture with enhancements for emotional expressiveness, naturalness, and informativeness in speech generation. It utilizes curated synthetic data and optimizes the training and decoding pipelines to handle multi-turn dialogue and function-call scenarios. Mini-Omni2 [71] further extends Mini-Omni framework by integrating multimodal understanding and full-duplex interaction capabilities. LLaMA-Omni [21] introduces a streaming, non-autoregressive speech decoder based on Connectionist Temporal Classification, enabling direct and efficient generation of discrete audio tokens without relying on step-by-step prediction. Freeze-Omni [66], on the other hand, freezes the LLM parameters during training, preserving its original capabilities while achieving low-latency speech-to-speech interaction through streaming and decoder integration. Qwen2.5-Omni [74] supports multimodal input and simultaneous text-speech output via a thinker-talker architecture, using TMRoPE for improved audio-visual synchronization through explicit temporal encoding.
items.zh: 根据 LLM 是否可以直接理解和生成语音表示，现有系统可以分为端到端大型音频语言模型和级联大型音频语言模型。前者在统一框架内直接建模音频输入和输出，而后者依赖于涉及独立 ASR、LLM 和 TTS 组件的模块化流水线。传统的语音到文本和语音到语音系统通常采用级联架构，例如 AudioGPT [33] 和 Spoken-LLM [47]。然而，ASR + LLM + TTS 流水线具有高延迟和模块不匹配的问题。这激发了人们对统一端到端架构的兴趣，以实现更快、更无缝的集成。这一方向的一个里程碑是 GPT-4o [34]，它支持直接的端到端语音交互，无需中间文本转换。最近，出现了几种用于语音到语音对话的端到端 LALM [16, 21, 71, 72, 74]。例如，Moshi [16] 通过 RQ-Transformer 提高了效率，该 Transformer 同时生成文本和音频令牌。类似地，Mini-Omni [71] 并行生成语音和文本响应，遵循类似于 MusicGen [14] 的策略，与交错生成设计相比，实现了更低的第一个令牌延迟。LUCY [22] 基于 Mini-Omni 架构，增强了语音生成的情感表现力、自然性和信息性。它利用精心策划的合成数据，并优化训练和解码流水线以处理多轮对话和函数调用场景。Mini-Omni2 [71] 进一步扩展了 Mini-Omni 框架，集成了多模态理解和全双工交互能力。LLaMA-Omni [21] 引入了基于连接主义时间分类的流式非自回归语音解码器，能够直接高效地生成离散音频令牌，无需依赖逐步预测。另一方面，Freeze-Omni [66] 在训练期间冻结 LLM 参数，保留其原始能力，同时通过流式和解码器集成实现低延迟的语音到语音交互。Qwen2.5-Omni [74] 通过思考者-说话者架构支持多模态输入和同时文本-语音输出，使用 TMRoPE 通过显式时间编码改进音视频同步。

items.en: Different from our previous Step-Audio [32], Step-Audio 2 further integrates the generation of audio tokens into language modeling, achieves end-to-end audio perception and generation. As shown in Figure 3, Step-Audio 2 consists of an audio encoder, an audio adaptor, an LLM decoder and an audio detokenizer.
items.zh: 与我们之前的 Step-Audio [32] 不同，Step-Audio 2 进一步将音频令牌的生成集成到语言建模中，实现了端到端的音频感知和生成。如图 3 所示，Step-Audio 2 由音频编码器、音频适配器、LLM 解码器和音频解令牌器组成。

items.en: The audio encoder is pretrained on various speech and audio understanding tasks including ASR, speaker age and gender prediction, audio event detection, etc. The audio encoder has an output frame rate of 25 Hz and is frozen during the entire training process. An audio adaptor with a downsampling rate of 2 is employed to connect the audio encoder to LLM, thereby reducing the output frame rate of the audio encoder to 12.5 Hz.
items.zh: 音频编码器在各种语音和音频理解任务上进行了预训练，包括 ASR、说话者年龄和性别预测、音频事件检测等。音频编码器的输出帧率为 25 Hz，并在整个训练过程中冻结。采用下采样率为 2 的音频适配器将音频编码器连接到 LLM，从而将音频编码器的输出帧率降低到 12.5 Hz。

items.en: The LLM decoder directly takes the latent audio features from the audio adaptor as input, and outputs an interleaved sequence of discrete text and audio tokens. We employ the tokenizer from CosyVoice 2 [19] as the audio tokenizer. And the text and audio tokens are interleaved [31, 32, 77] at a fixed ratio and padded at the end to meet the ratio. The audio tokens are then extracted from the interleaved sequence and consumed by the audio detokenizer to generate the output waveform. The input audio features and output interleaved sequences are then pre-filled as the history information for the next round of conversation.
items.zh: LLM 解码器直接接收来自音频适配器的潜在音频特征作为输入，并输出交错的离散文本和音频令牌序列。我们采用 CosyVoice 2 [19] 的令牌器作为音频令牌器。文本和音频令牌以固定比例交错 [31, 32, 77]，并在末尾填充以满足该比例。然后从交错序列中提取音频令牌，并由音频解令牌器用于生成输出波形。输入音频特征和输出交错序列随后被预填充为下一轮对话的历史信息。

items.en: To provide more accurate responses and expand interactive capabilities, we design tools to retrieve audio, current date and time, weather forecast and web content directly with explicit or implicit voice inputs. Notably, we propose the audio search tool, a novel tool with a voice library of hundreds of thousands of speeches with their corresponding transcriptions and descriptions. With the retrieved speech from audio search, Step-Audio 2 is able to mimic the speaking style or switching timbre according to the speech. During inference, the retrieved information is appended after the input audio features before generating speech outputs.
items.zh: 为了提供更准确的响应并扩展交互能力，我们设计了工具，通过显式或隐式语音输入检索音频、当前日期和时间、天气预报和网络内容。值得注意的是，我们提出了音频搜索工具，这是一种新颖的工具，拥有包含数十万条语音及其对应转录和描述的语音库。通过音频搜索检索到的语音，Step-Audio 2 能够模仿说话风格或根据语音切换音色。在推理过程中，检索到的信息在生成语音输出之前附加到输入音频特征之后。

items.en: Similar to Step-Audio [32] and Step-Audio-AQAA [31] , Step-Audio 2’s audio detokenizer also consists of a Flow Matching module and a HiFi-GAN [42] vocoder. The Flow-Matching module generates Mel spectrograms from the output audio tokens, while the vocoder further converts the Mel spectrograms into waveforms. For Flow-Matching, we incorporate a CNN-based encoder layer after each self-attention module within the transformer block and train the model on 200,000 hours of high-quality speech. This enhancement significantly improves its Mel spectrogram reconstruction capability, leading to substantial gains in both pronunciation accuracy and timbre similarity.
items.zh: 与 Step-Audio [32] 和 Step-Audio-AQAA [31] 类似，Step-Audio 2 的音频解令牌器也由流匹配模块和 HiFi-GAN [42] 声码器组成。流匹配模块从输出音频令牌生成梅尔频谱图，而声码器进一步将梅尔频谱图转换为波形。对于流匹配，我们在 Transformer 块中的每个自注意力模块之后加入了一个基于 CNN 的编码器层，并在 20 万小时的高质量语音上训练模型。这一增强显著提高了其梅尔频谱图重建能力，从而在发音准确性和音色相似性方面取得了显著提升。

items.en: Step-Audio 2 employs the same deployment infrastructure used in Step-Audio [32] and Step-Audio-AQAA [31], which includes a voice activity detection (VAD) module to filter out input speeches and achieves real-time voice conversation.
items.zh: Step-Audio 2 采用了与 Step-Audio [32] 和 Step-Audio-AQAA [31] 相同的部署基础设施，包括一个语音活动检测（VAD）模块来过滤输入语音，并实现实时语音对话。

items.en: Step-Audio 2 model is initialized with a textual LLM and then continually pre-trained on 1.356T tokens of textual and audio data over 21 days.
items.zh: Step-Audio 2 模型使用文本 LLM 初始化，然后在 1.356 万亿令牌的文本和音频数据上持续预训练 21 天。

items.en: We first utilize 100B tokens of ASR data to facilitate effective alignment between speech and text feature spaces within the adaptor. During this phase, both the audio encoder and LLM are frozen, with only the adaptor being trained. We conduct training for 12K steps at an 8,192 sequence length. And the learning rate decays from 10−410^{-4} to 2×10−52\times 10^{-5}.
items.zh: 我们首先使用 1000 亿令牌的 ASR 数据来促进适配器内语音和文本特征空间之间的有效对齐。在此阶段，音频编码器和 LLM 都被冻结，仅训练适配器。我们以 8192 的序列长度进行 12000 步的训练。学习率从 10^{-4} 衰减到 2×10^{-5}。

items.en: We then extend the tokenizer of the textual LLM with 6.6K audio tokens. To properly embed the new audio tokens and preserve the model’s textual capabilities, the model is then trained on 128B tokens of text data and 128B tokens of audio data. Specifically, audio data includes 80B, 32B and 16B tokens of TTS, speech-to-speech conversation and utterance-level text-speech interleaved continuation data respectively. The sequence length is increased to 16,384. And the learning rates of the LLM, adaptor, embedding layer and output layer are set to 2×10−52\times 10^{-5}, 5×10−55\times 10^{-5}, 5×10−55\times 10^{-5}, and 4×10−54\times 10^{-5} respectively.
items.zh: 然后，我们用6.6K音频词元扩展了文本LLM的分词器。为了正确嵌入新的音频词元并保留模型的文本能力，模型随后在128B文本词元和128B音频词元上进行了训练。具体来说，音频数据包括80B、32B和16B词元的TTS、语音到语音对话和话语级文本-语音交错续写数据。序列长度增加到16,384。LLM、适配器、嵌入层和输出层的学习率分别设置为2×10⁻⁵、5×10⁻⁵、5×10⁻⁵和4×10⁻⁵。

items.en: We then introduce our main pre-training process and further train the model on another 800B tokens of text and audio data. We unify the learning rates to 2×10−52\times 10^{-5} and employ 400B tokens of textual data and 42B, 120B, 8B, 30B, 5B, 45B and 150B tokens of ASR, TTS, speech-to-text translation, text-to-speech translation, speech-to-text continuation, utterance-level text-speech interleaved continuation and speech-to-speech conversation data respectively.
items.zh: 然后，我们介绍了主要的预训练过程，并在另外800B文本和音频词元上进一步训练模型。我们将学习率统一为2×10⁻⁵，并使用了400B文本词元以及42B、120B、8B、30B、5B、45B和150B的ASR、TTS、语音到文本翻译、文本到语音翻译、语音到文本续写、话语级文本-语音交错续写和语音到语音对话数据词元。

items.en: We finally employ 200B tokens of high-quality text and audio data to introduce a wider array of tasks and cooldown the model. We employ 24.6B, 12.4B, 2.4B, and 3.6B tokens of audio data for multilingual and dialectal ASR, TTS, paralinguistic information understanding, speech-to-text translation respectively. Besides, we develop a conversational speech synthesis pipeline to synthesize 6B, 15B and 36B tokens of audio data for speech-to-speech translation, utterance-level text-speech interleaved conversation and speech-to-speech conversation. To ensure the vocal diversity in the synthesized speech, the system references a library of approximately 50k unique speakers. We balance the audio data with 100B tokens of high-quality text data and the learning rate decays from 2×10−52\times 10^{-5} to 5×10−65\times 10^{-6}.
items.zh: 最后，我们使用了200B高质量文本和音频词元来引入更广泛的任务并对模型进行冷却。我们分别使用了24.6B、12.4B、2.4B和3.6B音频词元用于多语言和方言ASR、TTS、副语言信息理解、语音到文本翻译。此外，我们开发了一个对话语音合成流水线，合成了6B、15B和36B音频词元用于语音到语音翻译、话语级文本-语音交错对话和语音到语音对话。为确保合成语音的语音多样性，系统参考了约5万个独特说话者的库。我们用100B高质量文本词元平衡音频数据，学习率从2×10⁻⁵衰减到5×10⁻⁶。

items.en: After this comprehensive pre-training procedure, the model has acquired strong audio understanding and generation capabilities while maintaining its textual performance inherited from the initial textual LLM.
items.zh: 经过这一全面的预训练过程，模型获得了强大的音频理解和生成能力，同时保持了从初始文本LLM继承的文本性能。

items.en: We subsequently perform a large-scale, multi-task supervised fine-tuning (SFT) procedure [69] to instruct the model to follow human intention in fluid conversations and master core tasks. We select audio data from open-source and proprietary data to ensure broad coverage and high quality. The model is trained on 4B tokens of text and audio data for a single epoch. And the learning rate decays from 10−510^{-5} to 10−610^{-6}.
items.zh: 随后，我们执行了一个大规模、多任务的有监督微调（SFT）过程[69]，以指导模型在流畅对话中遵循人类意图并掌握核心任务。我们从开源和专有数据中选择音频数据，以确保广泛覆盖和高质量。模型在4B文本和音频词元上训练了一个周期。学习率从10⁻⁵衰减到10⁻⁶。

items.en: Specifically, we leverage extensive corpora such as GigaSpeech [8], WenetSpeech [78], and other in-house data to enhance the model’s performance in multilingual and multi-dialect ASR scenarios. We reformat existing datasets for audio event classification and audio captioning, such as AudioSet [23] and AudioCaps [41], into speech question-answer pairs for audio understanding. To capture paralinguistic information beyond just semantics, we introduce a detailed speech captioning task and build an in-house dataset, requiring the model to generate comprehensive textual descriptions encompassing 11 paralinguistic and environmental aspects.
items.zh: 具体来说，我们利用GigaSpeech [8]、WenetSpeech [78]等大规模语料库以及其他内部数据，增强了模型在多语言和多方言ASR场景中的性能。我们将音频事件分类和音频描述等现有数据集（如AudioSet [23]和AudioCaps [41]）重新格式化为语音问答对，用于音频理解。为了捕捉语义之外的副语言信息，我们引入了一个详细的语音描述任务，并构建了一个内部数据集，要求模型生成涵盖11个副语言和环境方面的全面文本描述。

items.en: We employ high-quality, professionally labeled data collected in-house for TTS. We utilize the Chinese-to-English and English-to-Chinese subsets from the CoVoST 2 [63] dataset for speech-to-speech translation.
items.zh: 我们使用内部收集的高质量、专业标注数据进行TTS。我们使用CoVoST 2 [63]数据集中的中译英和英译中子集进行语音到语音翻译。

items.en: We leverage high-quality in-house textual data for classic text-to-text conversation. Multiple LLMs are then employed to rewrite these text conversations as dialogue scripts with a more natural, colloquial style. We randomly insert emotion and speed instructions into the generated scripts to enable basic emotion and speaking style control. The scripts are then synthesized into speech conversations using our conversation synthesis pipeline.
items.zh: 我们利用高质量的内部文本数据进行经典的文本到文本对话。然后使用多个LLM将这些文本对话重写为更自然、口语化风格的对话脚本。我们在生成的脚本中随机插入情感和速度指令，以实现基本的情感和说话风格控制。然后使用我们的对话合成流水线将这些脚本合成为语音对话。

items.en: We construct approximately 1K dialogue scripts in text for each type of external tools. Within these scripts, instructions with explicit or implicit tool invocation intentions and their corresponding statements are inserted into common dialogues. The scripts are then synthesized into speech conversations using our conversation synthesis pipeline.
items.zh: 我们为每种外部工具构建了大约1K个文本对话脚本。在这些脚本中，将带有显式或隐式工具调用意图的指令及其对应语句插入到常见对话中。然后使用我们的对话合成流水线将这些脚本合成为语音对话。

items.en: Besides, we construct and employ two reasoning-centric datasets during SFT to cold-start the subsequent reinforcement learning process. First, we build a dataset to enable and robust audio understanding in complex acoustic scenarios, by combining multiple audios from AudioSet and AudioCaps, thereby creating intricate acoustic environments. To better address and respond to the paralinguistic information in speech conversations, we synthesize a speech conversation dataset with our conversation synthesis pipeline, based on dialogue scripts with appropriate emotion descriptions generated from textual LLMs. Subsequently, a textual LLM with reasoning capabilities is employed to produce question–answer pairs with explicit step-by-step reasoning traces, according to the audio mixing recipes or the generated dialogue scripts.
items.zh: 此外，我们在SFT期间构建并使用了两个以推理为中心的数据集，以冷启动后续的强化学习过程。首先，我们通过组合AudioSet和AudioCaps中的多个音频，构建了一个数据集，以实现在复杂声学场景中的鲁棒音频理解，从而创建复杂的声学环境。为了更好地处理语音对话中的副语言信息，我们基于文本LLM生成的带有适当情感描述的对话脚本，使用我们的对话合成流水线合成了一个语音对话数据集。随后，使用具有推理能力的文本LLM，根据音频混合配方或生成的对话脚本，生成带有显式逐步推理轨迹的问答对。

items.en: To enhance the model’s reasoning capabilities in audio understanding and speech interaction, we implement a multi-stage reinforcement learning strategy. We leverage our reasoning-centric datasets from SFT and utilize two stages of proximal policy optimization (PPO) [54] to optimize reasoning efficiency for real-time audio engagement. In the first stage, a binary reward function is employed to limit the thinking sequence length to a predefined maximum. This reward function assigns a value of 1 for reasoning that is appropriately concise (neither empty nor excessively long) and 0 otherwise. Training is conducted for 60 iterations with a global batch size of 64, using an actor learning rate of 1×10−61\times 10^{-6} and a critic learning rate of 2.5×10−62.5\times 10^{-6}. The second stage transitions from binary rewards to learned preference scoring, utilizing a trained reward model to evaluate response quality. This stage involves an additional 120 iterations while maintaining the same batch size and learning rate settings. Finally, we incorporate group relative policy optimization (GRPO) [54] for 400 iterations to further improve the model’s audio perceptual abilities.
items.zh: 为了增强模型在音频理解和语音交互中的推理能力，我们实施了一个多阶段强化学习策略。我们利用了SFT中的推理中心数据集，并采用两个阶段的近端策略优化（PPO）[54]来优化实时音频交互的推理效率。在第一阶段，使用二元奖励函数将思考序列长度限制在预定义的最大值。该奖励函数对适当简洁的推理（既不为空也不过长）赋值为1，否则为0。训练进行了60次迭代，全局批量大小为64，演员学习率为1×10⁻⁶，评论家学习率为2.5×10⁻⁶。第二阶段从二元奖励过渡到学习到的偏好评分，使用训练好的奖励模型评估响应质量。该阶段进行了额外的120次迭代，同时保持相同的批量大小和学习率设置。最后，我们引入了群体相对策略优化（GRPO）[54]进行了400次迭代，以进一步提高模型的音频感知能力。

items.en: As the most critical component of audio understanding and speech interaction, we first evaluate the model’s capability in automatic speech recognition. We evaluate Step-Audio 2 across six Chinese test sets, four English test sets, three multilingual test sets (Japanese, Cantonese, Arabic), and six in-house Chinese dialect and accented Mandarin test sets. For comparative analysis, we utilize top-performing models from both open-source and commercial domains as baselines, including Doubao LLM ASR111Doubao LLM ASR refers to https://www.volcengine.com/docs/6561/1354868, GPT-4o Transcribe222GPT-4o Transcribe is evaluated using its latest model, gpt-4o-transcribe, via its official API., Kimi-Audio [18], and Qwen-Omni. We prefer GPT-4o Transcribe than GPT-4o Audio since the formers provide stronger results. Notably, Doubao LLM ASR and GPT-4o Transcribe represent specialized ASR systems that achieve leading-edge performance.
items.zh: 作为音频理解和语音交互中最关键的组成部分，我们首先评估了模型在自动语音识别方面的能力。我们在六个中文测试集、四个英文测试集、三个多语言测试集（日语、粤语、阿拉伯语）以及六个内部中文方言和带口音普通话测试集上评估了Step-Audio 2。为了进行比较分析，我们使用了开源和商业领域表现最佳的模型作为基线，包括Doubao LLM ASR¹¹、GPT-4o Transcribe¹²、Kimi-Audio [18]和Qwen-Omni。我们更倾向于GPT-4o Transcribe而非GPT-4o Audio，因为前者提供了更强的结果。值得注意的是，Doubao LLM ASR和GPT-4o Transcribe是达到领先性能的专用ASR系统。

items.en: We evaluate all the models without specifying language333We evaluate without specifying language to ensure a fair comparison. Notably, Qwen-Omni lacks a language-independent testing approach, specifying language may yield better results. and summarize the results in Table 1. Step-Audio 2 outperforms existing open-source and commercial ASR models in both general English and Chinese recognition, achieving an average word error rate (WER) of 3.18% on English and an average character error rate (CER) of 3.11% on Chinese test sets. Moreover, Step-Audio 2 offers comparable results to GPT-4o Transcribe on Arabian and Japanese recognition, to Qwen-Omni on Cantonese recognition, demonstrating its capability in multilingual speech recognition. In addition, Step-Audio 2 achieves the lowest average CER among 4 in-house Chinese accented Mandarin and 2 dialect test sets. These results highlight the superiority of Step-Audio 2 in understanding the semantic information in speech.
items.zh: 我们在不指定语言的情况下评估所有模型³³，并将结果总结在表1中。Step-Audio 2在通用英语和中文识别方面均优于现有的开源和商业ASR模型，在英语测试集上平均词错误率（WER）为3.18%，在中文测试集上平均字符错误率（CER）为3.11%。此外，Step-Audio 2在阿拉伯语和日语识别上与GPT-4o Transcribe结果相当，在粤语识别上与Qwen-Omni结果相当，展示了其在多语言语音识别方面的能力。此外，Step-Audio 2在4个内部中文带口音普通话和2个方言测试集中取得了最低的平均CER。这些结果突显了Step-Audio 2在理解语音语义信息方面的优越性。

items.en: We then evaluate how Step-Audio 2 understands the paralinguistic information in speech beyond the semantic information. To this end, we introduce StepEval-Audio-Paralinguistic, a speech-to-speech benchmark that evaluates the model’s understanding of paralinguistic information across 11 dimensions using single-turn question answering.
items.zh: 然后，我们评估了Step-Audio 2如何理解语音中语义信息之外的副语言信息。为此，我们引入了StepEval-Audio-Paralinguistic，这是一个语音到语音的基准测试，通过单轮问答评估模型在11个维度上对副语言信息的理解。

items.en: StepEval-Audio-Paralinguistic comprises 550 speech samples evenly distributed across 11 tasks. We initially collect 400 Chinese speech clips for 8 of these tasks from public podcast recordings, encompassing gender, age, timbre, emotion, pitch, rhythm, speaking speed, speaking style, and vocal activity prediction or description. For sound event, scenario, and vocal sound detection or description, we source 50 event-related, 50 environmental, and 50 vocal sounds from AudioSet [23], CochlScene [35], and VocalSound [26], respectively. All original recordings are shorter than 30 seconds and uniformly resampled to 24,000 Hz, with annotations provided by professional groups in open-set natural language.
items.zh: StepEval-Audio-Paralinguistic包含550个语音样本，均匀分布在11个任务中。我们最初从公开播客录音中收集了8个任务的400个中文语音片段，涵盖性别、年龄、音色、情感、音高、节奏、语速、说话风格以及声音活动预测或描述。对于声音事件、场景和声音检测或描述，我们分别从AudioSet [23]、CochlScene [35]和VocalSound [26]中获取了50个事件相关、50个环境相关和50个声音相关的音频。所有原始录音均短于30秒，并统一重采样至24,000 Hz，由专业团队以开放集自然语言提供标注。

items.en: We then generate textual questions and answers based on the ground-truth annotations for each task with textual LLMs. For the first 8 tasks, we use the input speech as a prompt to clone a synthesized question speech and randomly concatenate the question before or after the original speech. For the remaining 3 tasks, we further mix these audios with synthesized speeches before question concatenation, creating more challenging test samples.
items.zh: 然后，我们基于每个任务的真实标注，使用文本LLM生成文本问题和答案。对于前8个任务，我们使用输入语音作为提示来克隆一个合成的提问语音，并将问题随机拼接在原始语音之前或之后。对于其余3个任务，我们在问题拼接之前进一步将这些音频与合成语音混合，创建更具挑战性的测试样本。

items.en: We also establish an automatic evaluation protocol for StepEval-Audio-Paralinguistic, which initially transcribes model outputs into text using ASR, followed by automatic judgment with a textual LLM. More information, along with the complete StepEval-Audio-Paralinguistic test set and evaluation code, is available at https://github.com/stepfun-ai/Step-Audio2 to foster further research on paralinguistic information understanding.
items.zh: 我们还为StepEval-Audio-Paralinguistic建立了一个自动评估协议，该协议首先使用ASR将模型输出转录为文本，然后使用文本LLM进行自动判断。更多信息以及完整的StepEval-Audio-Paralinguistic测试集和评估代码，可在https://github.com/stepfun-ai/Step-Audio2获取，以促进对副语言信息理解的进一步研究。

items.en: We evaluate GPT-4o Audio, Kimi-Audio, Qwen-Omni, Step-Audio-AQAA, and Step-Audio 2 using the StepEval-Audio-Paralinguistic benchmark, with results presented in Table 2. The experimental results highlight the comprehensive capabilities of Step-Audio 2 in understanding various paralinguistic information, achieving an average accuracy of 76.55, which is a significant improvement over other baseline models.
items.zh: 我们使用StepEval-Audio-Paralinguistic基准测试评估了GPT-4o Audio、Kimi-Audio、Qwen-Omni、Step-Audio-AQAA和Step-Audio 2，结果如表2所示。实验结果突显了Step-Audio 2在理解各种副语言信息方面的全面能力，平均准确率达到76.55，相比其他基线模型有显著提升。

items.en: We then assess Step-Audio 2’s general audio comprehension across sound, speech, and music using the latest version of the MMAU benchmark [58]444MMAU v05.15.25 test-mini.
items.zh: 然后，我们使用最新版本的MMAU基准测试[58]⁴⁴评估了Step-Audio 2在声音、语音和音乐方面的通用音频理解能力。

items.en: As baselines, we employ Audio Flamingo 3, Gemini 2.5 Pro, GPT-4o Audio, Kimi-Audio, Omni-R1 [56], Qwen2.5-Omni, and Step-Audio-AQAA. We obtain the reported results for Audio Flamingo 3, Omni-R1, and Qwen2.5-Omni from their original papers. The results of Gemini 2.5 Pro are obtained from the official website of MMAU. And we re-evaluate GPT-4o Audio, Kimi-Audio and Step-Audio-AQAA due to the recent update of the MMAU benchmark.
items.zh: 作为基线，我们使用了Audio Flamingo 3、Gemini 2.5 Pro、GPT-4o Audio、Kimi-Audio、Omni-R1 [56]、Qwen2.5-Omni和Step-Audio-AQAA。我们从原始论文中获取了Audio Flamingo 3、Omni-R1和Qwen2.5-Omni的报告结果。Gemini 2.5 Pro的结果来自MMAU官方网站。由于MMAU基准测试最近更新，我们重新评估了GPT-4o Audio、Kimi-Audio和Step-Audio-AQAA。

items.en: The results are summarized in Table 3. Step-Audio 2 achieves the highest average score of 77.4%, followed by Omni-R1 and Audio Flamingo 3, both of which are specialized approaches in audio understanding. Specifically, Step-Audio 2 yields the best results in sound and music tracks and on par results with the best in speech track, demonstrating its versatility and robustness across different audio domains.
items.zh: 结果汇总于表3。Step-Audio 2 取得了最高平均得分 77.4%，其次是 Omni-R1 和 Audio Flamingo 3，两者都是音频理解领域的专门方法。具体而言，Step-Audio 2 在声音和音乐轨道上取得了最佳结果，并在语音轨道上与最佳结果持平，展示了其在不同音频领域的通用性和鲁棒性。

items.en: We evaluate the model’s bidirectional Chinese-English speech translation capabilities using two benchmarks: speech-to-text translation (S2TT) on CoVoST 2 [63] and speech-to-speech translation (S2ST) on CVSS [37]. Additionally, we use the reported results of Qwen2.5-Omni for CoVoST 2, while for CVSS, we employ Qwen-Omni as a baseline. Kimi-Audio is excluded because it consistently ignores prompts and performs ASR instead of translation. Using BLEU as the evaluation metric, the results in Table 4 demonstrate that Step-Audio 2 achieves superior performance in Chinese-English bidirectional translations, obtaining the highest average score on both the CoVoST 2 and CVSS test sets.
items.zh: 我们使用两个基准评估模型的英汉双向语音翻译能力：CoVoST 2 [63] 上的语音到文本翻译（S2TT）和 CVSS [37] 上的语音到语音翻译（S2ST）。此外，对于 CoVoST 2，我们使用 Qwen2.5-Omni 的报告结果；对于 CVSS，我们使用 Qwen-Omni 作为基线。Kimi-Audio 被排除，因为它始终忽略提示并执行 ASR 而非翻译。使用 BLEU 作为评估指标，表4的结果表明，Step-Audio 2 在英汉双向翻译中取得了优越性能，在 CoVoST 2 和 CVSS 测试集上均获得了最高平均分。

items.en: To address the gap in the availability of suitable test sets for tool calling in speech conversations, we introduce StepEval-Audio-Toolcall, a test set that evaluates the model’s ability in tool invocation, selection and parameter extraction under Chinese speech conversations.
items.zh: 为了解决语音对话中工具调用缺乏合适测试集的问题，我们引入了 StepEval-Audio-Toolcall，这是一个评估模型在中文语音对话中工具调用、选择和参数提取能力的测试集。

items.en: We employ a textual LLM to generate 200 multi-turn dialogue scripts for each kind of tool. Each script contains 3-6 turns of inputs and outputs, in which previous turns may or may not include tool calling statements, but the final input must contain a calling intention to a specific external tool. We then balance the samples with an equal number of negative samples for each kind of tools, in which the final speech input either has no tool calling intention or intention to call on other kinds of tools. Subsequently, we synthesize these scripts into speeches with our conversation synthesis pipeline. And we propose an automatic evaluation protocol to employ Qwen3-32B to automatically examine the output and tool calling statements. We release StepEval-Audio-Toolcall including the original scripts, synthesized speech conversations and the corresponding evaluation script in https://github.com/stepfun-ai/Step-Audio2.
items.zh: 我们使用文本 LLM 为每种工具生成 200 个多轮对话脚本。每个脚本包含 3-6 轮输入和输出，其中前几轮可能包含或不包含工具调用语句，但最后一轮输入必须包含对特定外部工具的调用意图。然后，我们为每种工具平衡相同数量的负样本，其中最后一轮语音输入要么没有工具调用意图，要么意图调用其他类型的工具。随后，我们使用对话合成流水线将这些脚本合成为语音。我们提出了一种自动评估协议，使用 Qwen3-32B 自动检查输出和工具调用语句。我们在 https://github.com/stepfun-ai/Step-Audio2 发布了 StepEval-Audio-Toolcall，包括原始脚本、合成语音对话和相应的评估脚本。

items.en: Despite that there is no other LALM that provides custom tool calling, we employ Qwen3-32B as a baseline to illustrate how Step-Audio 2 manages external tools in comparison to textual LLMs. As shown in Table 5, Step-Audio 2 achieves on par with tool calling accuracy with textual LLMs even with speech input. Notably, Step-Audio 2 significantly outperforms Qwen3-32B in accurately calling our innovative audio search tool, highlighting its specialty as a multi-modal LLM than textual LLMs.
items.zh: 尽管没有其他 LALM 提供自定义工具调用，我们仍使用 Qwen3-32B 作为基线，以说明 Step-Audio 2 如何与文本 LLM 相比管理外部工具。如表5所示，即使输入为语音，Step-Audio 2 在工具调用准确率上也与文本 LLM 持平。值得注意的是，Step-Audio 2 在准确调用我们创新的音频搜索工具方面显著优于 Qwen3-32B，凸显了其作为多模态 LLM 相对于文本 LLM 的专业性。

items.en: We finally employ URO-Bench [75] to evaluate Step-Audio 2 and other open-source and commercial LALMs, including GPT-4o Audio, Kimi-Audio, Qwen-Omni, and Step-Audio-AQAA. URO-Bench consists of 16 and 20 datasets on two difficulty tracks, evaluating the model’s understanding, reasoning and oral conversation abilities, such as ASR, instruction following, commonsense knowledge, mathematics, and speech naturalness, emotion and speaking styles expressions. We follow the ASR-mediated procedure in URO-Bench for evaluation, employing Whisper for ASR and GPT-4o-mini for automatic judging.
items.zh: 我们最后使用 URO-Bench [75] 评估 Step-Audio 2 和其他开源及商业 LALM，包括 GPT-4o Audio、Kimi-Audio、Qwen-Omni 和 Step-Audio-AQAA。URO-Bench 包含两个难度轨道的 16 和 20 个数据集，评估模型的理解、推理和口语对话能力，例如 ASR、指令遵循、常识知识、数学以及语音自然度、情感和说话风格表达。我们遵循 URO-Bench 中的 ASR 中介流程进行评估，使用 Whisper 进行 ASR，使用 GPT-4o-mini 进行自动评判。

items.en: As demonstrated in Table 6, Step-Audio 2 significantly outperforms existing large audio language models, including GPT-4o Audio, in Chinese speech-to-speech conversation scenarios, achieving the highest average scores of 78.86 on the basic track and 70.83 on the pro track. In English speech-to-speech conversations, while Step-Audio 2 is slightly outperformed by GPT-4o Audio, it provides very competitive results and exceeds the other approaches. More detailed results on URO-Bench are provided in Table 7.
items.zh: 如表6所示，Step-Audio 2 在中文语音到语音对话场景中显著优于现有的大型音频语言模型（包括 GPT-4o Audio），在基础轨道和专业轨道上分别取得了 78.86 和 70.83 的最高平均分。在英语语音到语音对话中，虽然 Step-Audio 2 略逊于 GPT-4o Audio，但提供了非常有竞争力的结果，并超过了其他方法。URO-Bench 的更详细结果见表7。

items.en: We introduce Step-Audio 2, an end-to-end large audio language model designed for enterprise speech and audio understanding, as well as intelligent speech interaction. Step-Audio 2 leverages a latent audio encoder and reinforcement learning to enhance its speech and audio comprehension capabilities. Furthermore, by integrating the generation of discrete audio tokens into language modeling, Step-Audio 2 achieves genuine end-to-end speech interaction and improves its responsiveness to paralinguistic information, such as speaking styles and emotions. Step-Audio 2 is also capable of utilizing external tools including web search and audio search for multi-modal RAG. Trained on 8 million hours of speeches and audios, Step-Audio 2 demonstrates state-of-the-art performance across various tasks, including ASR, audio understanding, speech translation, and general speech conversation, outperforming both open-source and commercial solutions.
items.zh: 我们介绍了 Step-Audio 2，这是一个端到端的大型音频语言模型，专为企业级语音和音频理解以及智能语音交互而设计。Step-Audio 2 利用潜在音频编码器和强化学习来增强其语音和音频理解能力。此外，通过将离散音频令牌的生成集成到语言建模中，Step-Audio 2 实现了真正的端到端语音交互，并提高了对副语言信息（如说话风格和情感）的响应能力。Step-Audio 2 还能够使用外部工具，包括网络搜索和音频搜索，用于多模态 RAG。经过 800 万小时语音和音频的训练，Step-Audio 2 在包括 ASR、音频理解、语音翻译和通用语音对话在内的各种任务上展示了最先进的性能，优于开源和商业解决方案。
